_schema: 6-beat structure per CLAUDE.md law 5. ALL text below is scratch placeholder awaiting Director wording (law 6).

intro.speaker: earl
intro.text: [Situation — Earl behind the desk, dry and deliberate. Your family's debt file is already open in front of him.]

options.text: [IT option — argue the rate with amortization math.]
options.label: [IT Nephew]

options.text: [Old School option — invoke the family history with this bank.]
options.label: [Old School]

rate_success.speaker: earl
rate_success.text: [Result — he can't fault the math and shaves the rate. Doesn't mean he likes you.]

rate_failure.speaker: earl
rate_failure.text: [Good failure — you lectured a banker on banking and got a term wrong. He's colder now; word reaches the dealer.]

history_success.speaker: earl
history_success.text: [Result — your father's name still means something in this office. A small mercy on terms, quietly done.]

history_failure.speaker: earl
history_failure.text: [Good failure — he remembers the family debt differently than you tell it. Awkward. The diner hears you traded on a dead man's name.]

status.speaker: earl
status.text: [Flavor — states the debt, the daily interest, and the day of the month, plainly. The calendar should sting a little.]
